text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 226 

PIHP_MOS 

LABEL: Prepaid Inpatient Health Plan (PIHP) Months 

DESCRIPTION: Number of months the beneficiary was enrolled in a Medical-only Prepaid Inpatient Health Plan (PIHP) 
Managed Care Plan in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: PIHP_MOS 

LONG NAME: PIHP_MOS 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 3 

FILE(S): Managed Care 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility
